subcodes.title: Words spoken in San Francisco, 1912-10-06
subcodes.first_line: The reality of divinity is holy beyond descent and incarnation but the divine Manifestations are expressive of the attributes and perfections of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقیقت الوهیت منزه از حلول و دخول است ولی مظاهر الهیه حاکی از صفات و کمالات حق سبحانه و تعالی هستند
subcodes.subjects: @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
